mdRecord.dcterms:title: 1995 Season
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Blue-Cover Playbill for the 1995 Barter Theatre Season. Shows include: Doctor Jekyll and Miss Hyde by David DeBoy, June 21- July 22 | The Sweet By 'n' By by Frank Higgins, July 26- Aug 26 | Sweet Deliverance by Eric Houston, June 8- July 2 | Greater Loesser, July 6- July 30 | Wrong Turn at Lungfish by Garry Marshall & Lowell Ganz. Directed by John Hardy.
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Theater
Virginia
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
